ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/PSRule.Rules.Azure
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/PSRule.Rules.Azure
Language: powershell
Rules to validate Azure resources and infrastructure as code (IaC) using PSRule.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ChrisTitusTech/winutil
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ChrisTitusTech/winutil
Language: powershell
Chris Titus Tech's Windows Utility - Install Programs, Tweaks, Fixes, and Updates

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Raphire/Win11Debloat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat
Language: powershell
A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
Language: powershell
Community-driven baseline to accelerate Intune adoption and learning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/python-versions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/python-versions
Language: powershell
Python builds for Actions Runner Images

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dartraiden/NVIDIA-patcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dartraiden/NVIDIA-patcher
Language: powershell
Adds 3D acceleration support for P106-090 / P106-100 / P104-090 / P104-100 / P102-100 / CMP 30HX / CMP 40HX / CMP 50HX / CMP 70HX / CMP 90HX / CMP 170HX mining cards as well as RTX 3060 3840SP, RTX 3080 Ti 20 GB, RTX 4070 10 GB, L40 ES, and RTX 5080M ES N22W-ES-A1.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ios12checker/Windows-Maintenance-Tool
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ios12checker/Windows-Maintenance-Tool
Language: powershell
A powerful, all-in-one Windows maintenance toolkit built entirely in Batch & PowerShell. Designed for power users, sysadmins, and curious tinkerers – now smarter, safer, and fully offline-compatible.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jamesstringer90/Easy-GPU-PV
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jamesstringer90/Easy-GPU-PV
Language: powershell
A Project dedicated to making GPU Partitioning on Windows easier!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mandiant/flare-vm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mandiant/flare-vm
Language: powershell
A collection of software installations scripts for Windows systems that allows you to easily setup and maintain a reverse engineering environment on a VM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/hve-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/hve-core
Language: powershell
A refined collection of Hypervelocity Engineering components (instructions, prompts, agents, and skills) to start your project off right, or upgrade your existing projects to get the most out of GitHub Copilot

ns0:entry.ns0:title: psmux/psmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/psmux/psmux
Language: powershell
Tmux on Windows Powershell - tmux for PowerShell, Windows Terminal, cmd.exe. Includes psmux, pmux, and tmux commands. This is native Powershell Tmux designed for Windows in Rust 🦀
